name: Aggregate Liability Cap
text: The aggregate liability of either Party under or in connection with this Agreement, whether arising in contract, tort (including negligence), breach of statutory duty, or otherwise, shall not exceed the total amounts paid or payable by the Paying Party during the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

legal_basis.note: Courts award only reasonably foreseeable loss
Liquidated damages — courts award reasonable compensation only

invalid_if: Liability is excluded for fraud or wilful misconduct
title: Liability Cap
dispute_hotspots: Whether cap applies to IP infringement third-party claims — typically excluded
